title: SOA-Harness v1.0 Budget Projection Observability Response
description: Normative schema for GET /budget/projection (Core §13.5). Byte-identity excludes generated_at. Not-a-side-effect: reads MUST NOT advance counters or fire cancellations.

projection_headroom.description: Turns remaining before projected exhaustion at current p95 rate + safety factor. Negative values indicate already-exceeded budget — expect StopReason::BudgetExhausted on next significant turn.

cold_start_baseline_active.description: True when the session has no prior turns and the projection uses the §13.1 cold-start baseline. False once at least one real turn has been observed.
